discovery_domain: Horn-closed basis minimization for the monotone refill transfer frontier
holdout_domain: the same 13 holdout fact states from v29
strongest_claim: In the monotone refill transfer case, the 6-bit exact semantic basis from v29 remains minimal even after allowing closure under all exact single- and pair-Horn implications among the holdout error bits. Its Horn closure expands to 11 of the 13 error bits, but no basis of size 5 or less is exact.
